subheadline.res: Fourteen residences shaped by the light of Serralves, each with a private garden and the rare calm of Boavista.
subheadline.inv: A prime address and signature architecture, across just fourteen homes — an asset made to endure.

gallery.headline: Spaces shaped for light — travertine, timber and a garden that reaches into the home.

location.title: Beside Serralves, in the heart of Boavista
location.lead: On Rua Professor Augusto Nobre, a few steps from the Serralves Museum and Foundation.
body: Boavista is one of Porto's most discreet residential addresses — between the culture of Serralves, the green of the City Park and the nearness of the Foz seafront.
Each residence opens onto a private garden, with generous solar exposure and the rare quiet of living beside one of the city's largest green spaces.

highlights.title: Serralves Museum
highlights.description: Alongside the Foundation, the museum and its gardens.

highlights.title: City Park
highlights.description: The country's largest urban park, minutes away.

highlights.title: Foz and the sea
highlights.description: The ocean and the seafront, a short distance away.

highlights.title: Airport
highlights.description: Francisco Sá Carneiro roughly 15 minutes away.

availability.title: Availability
availability.intro: Current status of the fourteen residences. More than half are already committed.
availability.note: Sold and reserved residences remain visible. Prices are shared at the private presentation.

finishes.title: Finishes & customization
finishes.intro: Stone, timber and discreet technology — materials chosen to endure. Still under construction, there is room to personalize.

items.title: Travertine façade
items.description: Natural stone in a warm, timeless travertine beige.

items.title: Schindler lifts
items.description: Private, quiet access to every floor.

items.title: Private garage
items.description: A private garage box per apartment, with space for one to three cars.

items.title: Underfloor heating
items.description: Radiant floors and ducted air conditioning.

items.title: Home automation
items.description: Integrated control of light, climate and security.

items.title: Solar & electric mobility
items.description: Solar panels, heat pumps and electric-vehicle chargers.

items.title: Wood floors
items.description: Laminated wood flooring across the living and private areas.

developer.title: A developer with a track record
developer.lead: VA Properties conceives, designs and builds a selective number of projects in prime locations across Portugal.
body: More than sixteen developments across five regions, from the Algarve to Porto — each privately overseen, from design to delivery.
Off-plan, trust is built on a record. The architecture and interiors of Serralves Garden are by the PHOCUS studio.
developer.scarcityLine: More than half of the residences are already committed.

architecture.architects: PHOCUS — Pedro Moreira and Cristina Couto
architecture.note: The studio behind the design and interiors of Serralves Garden.

investment.title: An asset that endures
investment.intro: For buyers with a long horizon, Serralves Garden brings together what holds value — a prime address, signature architecture and a deliberately scarce offering.

points.title: Prime location
points.body: Boavista, beside Serralves — one of Porto's most stable addresses.

points.title: Signature architecture
points.body: PHOCUS design and fine materials, made to last.

points.title: Rarity
points.body: Fourteen residences only. Scarcity here is a fact, not a pitch.

points.title: Buying from abroad
points.body: Guidance in Portuguese and English, with remote presentations.

repricing.label: Phase repricing
repricing.note: The launch price against the current entry price, as phases sell through. No yield promises — only the project's own record.

foreignBuyer.title: Buying from abroad
body: We support international buyers throughout — legal and tax framing, translation and representation.
Video presentations, remote signing and guidance in Portuguese and English.

investment.disclaimer: General information only; not financial advice. Figures subject to confirmation.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: The essentials of the process. Everything else is shared at the private presentation.

items.q: How does the buying process work?
items.a: It begins with an enquiry through this page. A private presentation follows, with the full dossier — brochure, plans, finishing schedule and virtual tour — and guidance through to reservation and the CPCV.
The residences are presented on request. Share your preferences — typology and timeline — and our team will send the price and availability of the relevant units.

It means acquiring while still under construction, before completion. The purchase is formalized through a promissory contract (CPCV), with staged payments. Delivery is planned for the first quarter of 2027.

items.q: What is the level of finish?
items.a: Premium finishes — a Gaggenau kitchen, stone and wood, underfloor heating, home automation and a sustainability package with solar panels and heat pumps.
Yes. We guide the entire process in Portuguese and English, with remote presentations and legal and tax support.

finalCta.title: A private conversation, at your pace

body.res: Arrange a private presentation. We will walk you through the available residences, the plans and the finishing schedule — with no obligation.
body.inv: Arrange a private presentation. We will discuss location, architecture and the value of the asset — with support for buying from abroad.

finalCta.note: We reply in Portuguese or English. No pressure.

whatsapp.label: WhatsApp
whatsapp.prefill: Hello. I'm interested in Serralves Garden and would like to know more.

footer.address: Rua Professor Augusto Nobre 436, Boavista, Porto
footer.disclaimer: Imagery and areas are indicative and subject to confirmation.

typology.title: Which typology are you looking for?
typology.help: Choose the closest fit. Available ones are marked.

purpose.title: Are you considering this residence —
purpose.help: Confirm, so we can tailor the conversation.

strategy.title: What is your strategy?
strategy.help: It helps us prepare the presentation.

timeline.title: What is your horizon?
timeline.help: When you would like to decide.

offplan.title: Delivery is planned for the first quarter of 2027. Does that work for you?
offplan.help: This is an off-plan purchase, still under construction.

location.title: Where are you currently based?
location.help: And which language you prefer for contact.

contact.title: How can we reach you?
contact.help: We will be in touch discreetly.
contact.name: Name
contact.consent: By sending, you agree to be contacted by our team about Serralves Garden. Demo — no data is actually sent.

confirmation.title: Thank you. We have your request.
confirmation.body: Our team will prepare the presentation and the residences best matched to your profile.
confirmation.followUp: Our team will be in touch shortly, in Portuguese or English.
